candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: For the four identical current-carrying wires shown (with conventional current coming out of the plane of the page), the wire on the right is labeled P. What is the direction of the total magnetic force on the wire labeled P that is caused by the other wires?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 如图所示,有四根相同的电流电线,传统电流方向从纸面向外。右侧的电线被标记为 P。请问在 P 点产生的磁场是由其他三根电线的磁场叠加而成的,磁场方向如何?
